manifest.title: SPX 0DTE 信号与风险复盘：截至 2026-07-22
manifest.description: 固定截止日的全部持久化信号盘点、RTH/GTH 漏斗、245 组参数敏感性、生产 trade-ready 回放与稳健修复记录。

query.description: Fixed-cutoff production-intent replay and separately labelled control/proxy cohorts.
filters: only readiness-health-complete sessions enter executable replay
production total is trade_ready × baseline × naked only
confirmed, prefill and gth_dip remain control/proxy cohorts
metric_definitions: Strict fill is the first recorded-provider ask at or below the persisted entry limit before the exclusive expires_at.
Backtest PnL is one-contract replay PnL and is not the user's broker-account PnL.
Commissions, explicit slippage, queue position, partial fills, market impact and manual alert latency are not modeled.

sources.label: Exhaustive persisted-signal, RTH funnel and parameter audit through 2026-07-22

query.engine: DuckDB, point-in-time quote replay and production-equivalent Python
query.sql: SELECT * FROM read_json_auto('data/features/*/date=*/*.jsonl', union_by_name=true) WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMPTZ '2026-07-23T00:00:00Z'; REPLAY 245 FOLLOW_THROUGH PARAMETER SETS WITH RECEIVED_AT KNOWLEDGE CUTOFF
query.description: Reconciles raw records to semantic opportunities, classifies RTH by America/New_York time, evaluates every persisted formal signal and runs an exact-NBBO follow-through sensitivity grid.
filters: semantic pricing identity = first_touch_at + contract_id + play
all parameter choices use point-in-time quote paths
expanding walk-forward results are separated from in-sample grid ranking
metric_definitions: Formal signal is the first transition of one lifecycle into CONFIRMED.
Raw intent evaluations are telemetry cadence rows, not independent signals.
Control/proxy PnL is one-contract replay PnL and is not production-account PnL.
Structure-pending counterfactuals are underlier-only and are never counted as exact option trades.

query.sql: SELECT confirmed_at, event_id, direction, thesis, level_kind, level, return_bps, CASE WHEN direction = 'up' THEN return_bps ELSE -return_bps END AS directional_return_bps FROM read_json_auto('data/features/level_decision_outcomes/date=*/outcomes.jsonl') WHERE horizon_seconds = 300 AND CAST(confirmed_at AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-20 00:00:00' AND CAST(confirmed_at AS TIMESTAMP) < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-23 00:00:00' ORDER BY confirmed_at
query.description: Unique formal confirmations at the 300-second horizon, signed so positive means the predicted direction was correct.
filters: America/New_York timestamps used for RTH classification
metric_definitions: Directional return bps equals raw SPX return bps for up signals and its negative for down signals.
Direction correct means directional return bps is strictly greater than zero.
RTH is 09:30 inclusive through 16:00 exclusive America/New_York on a trading day.

sources.label: Raw versus semantic pricing-outcome statistics at the 2026-07-22 intent

query.sql: WITH eligible AS (SELECT *, horizons."300".return_fraction AS return_fraction FROM read_json_auto('data/features/pricing_outcomes/date=*/outcomes.jsonl') WHERE touched = TRUE AND completed_at BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2026-07-02 09:22:05.290029' AND TIMESTAMP '2026-07-22 09:22:05.290029' AND horizons."300".return_fraction IS NOT NULL), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY first_touch_at, contract_id, play ORDER BY completed_at, event_id, level_kind) AS semantic_rank FROM eligible), compared AS (SELECT 'raw_event_rows' AS method, return_fraction FROM eligible WHERE play = 'level_breakout_call' AND level_kind = 'flip_high' UNION ALL SELECT 'semantic_first_touch', return_fraction FROM ranked WHERE semantic_rank = 1 AND play = 'level_breakout_call' AND level_kind = 'flip_high') SELECT method, COUNT(*) AS sample_count, SUM(CASE WHEN return_fraction > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, AVG(return_fraction) AS avg_return FROM compared GROUP BY method ORDER BY method
query.description: Compares legacy event-row counting with semantic first-touch/contract/play deduplication before grouping.
filters: deduplication occurs globally before play/level_kind grouping
metric_definitions: Win rate is positive 300-second option-mid return divided by retained sample count.
Confidence interval is a two-sided 95 percent Wilson interval for a binomial proportion.
Average return is the arithmetic mean of 300-second option-mid return fractions.

query.sql: SELECT * FROM parameter_decisions ORDER BY priority
query.description: Reviewed code/config changes made in response to the fixed-cutoff evidence.
filters: no loosening of the 20-second entry window or limit discipline
forward-only health schema; historical observations are not fabricated
metric_definitions: The temporary 1.00 reward/risk floor removed every historically quantifiable RTH TradeReady opportunity and did not select better directional outcomes.
The restored 0.25 floor remains subordinate to RTH-only, three-point target room, ES confirmation, quote freshness, limit and entry-window gates.
The best in-sample follow-through grid failed the expanding walk-forward tail and therefore remains shadow-only.
Schema v2 health snapshots support future audit-equivalent walk-forward reconstruction; they do not repair 2026-07-14 through 2026-07-22.

query.sql: SELECT DATE '2026-07-16' AS latest_statement_end, DATE '2026-07-20' AS required_start, DATE '2026-07-22' AS required_end
query.description: The latest available broker Activity/Flex statement ends before the reported loss window; account identifiers are intentionally omitted.
filters: no statement or fill ledger covering 2026-07-20 through 2026-07-22 was available
metric_definitions: Loss reconciled means every broker fill, fee, size and realized PnL in the reported loss window is joined to a system signal or classified as discretionary/unmatched.

query.description: Reproduces recent directional outcomes, weekday slices, trade-ready replay rows and semantic-statistics correction.

cards.description: The reported approximately $12,000 loss cannot yet be tied to broker fills because the required statement window is missing.
Formal 300-second confirmations from Monday through Wednesday in the recent review window.
Full persisted formal RTH history versus the recent Monday-through-Wednesday window.
All unique persisted production entry decisions in the seven-session backtest.
Contract-consistent sessions toward the frozen 20-session review gate.

charts.title: 近三日正式确认的 300 秒方向收益
charts.subtitle: 周二两次方向正确；周三仅 1/5 正确且均发生在 RTH 之外
charts.question: Monday through Wednesday formal confirmations moved in the predicted direction after 300 seconds?
charts.rationale: Event-level bars preserve the very small sample and expose winner/loss concentration without hiding it behind an aggregate.

charts.question: How much did regenerated event rows distort the historical win-rate shown to the bad July 22 intent?
charts.rationale: Two bars show the material change from event-row inflation while the supporting table retains count, return and uncertainty.

tables.title: 周一至周三：两种不同证据口径
tables.subtitle: Formal 300s outcomes describe signal direction; control/proxy replay PnL is not production PnL.

tables.title: 全部正式 CONFIRMED：RTH 与非 RTH
tables.subtitle: RTH historically produced four formal signals; zero applies only to the recent 7/20–7/22 window.

tables.title: 最近三日 RTH 状态机漏斗

tables.title: 全部 3 个 production trade-ready 决策

blocks.body: # SPX 0DTE 信号与风险复盘：截至 2026-07-22

## Technical Summary

**RTH 不是从来没有信号。** 7/13–7/22 的 21 个正式 `CONFIRMED` 中，RTH 有 4 个、非 RTH 有 17 个；RTH 的 300 秒方向结果为 3 正 1 负，baseline 裸单 control replay 合计 +$885.00。最近 7/20–7/22 才是 RTH 正式确认归零。

最近三日归零也不是行情断流：每天 RTH 都覆盖 390/390 分钟，健康采样约每 5 秒一次，最大间隔低于 10.1 秒。10 个 RTH lifecycle 中，9 个被 `structure_change_pending` 立即失效，剩余 1 个因 90 秒内没有 retest 而超时。已经把结构候选从行情质量失败中拆出：pending 只阻止新 arm/rearm，已有 lifecycle 继续使用冻结 stable levels，候选真正 promoted 后再做 drift 校验。

245 组 follow-through 网格的样本内冠军在 expanding walk-forward 后段为 -$360.00，因此不写入生产。RR=1.00 也撤回到 0.25：1.00 会删除全部历史可量化 RTH TradeReady，且高 RR 历史子集并未更好。RTH-only、至少 3 点 target room、ES 反向 blocker、20 秒 entry window、不追价和 baseline exit 全部保留。

**现有材料仍不能解释你最近约 $12,000 的真实亏损。** 本地 broker Activity/Flex 只覆盖到 7/16，缺少 7/20–7/22 的成交、数量、手续费和实际退出；因此报告状态仍是 `partial`，回测盈亏不能冒充账户盈亏。

## RTH 到底有没有信号？

完整历史有 4 个正式 RTH confirmations，分别发生在 7/14 10:32 ET 和 7/15 10:54、11:50、13:49 ET。只有最近 7/20–7/22 为零。下面把全历史和最近窗口分开，避免再把“近三日为零”误读成“RTH 从未有信号”。

### 最近三日为什么归零

最近三日有完整行情和 10 个 RTH lifecycle：6 个到 testing、4 个到 break_pending、1 个到 accepted，但没有 retest/confirmed。9 个 lifecycle 被结构 candidate pending 提前杀死。用真实 SPX/ES 路径做有限反事实重放，7/20 与 7/21 的两个 break-pending 事件本可继续确认，7/22 那条仍会 timeout；前两条确认后 300 秒方向约为 -2.01、-1.40 bps。因此修复恢复的是状态机产出与可观察性，不是收益提升证明。

## Key Visual Findings

图中的每根柱都是一条独立正式确认，不把重复 evaluation 当作新信号。正值表示预测方向在 300 秒后正确；负值表示反向。小样本不做平滑，也不把周二的 2/2 或周三的 1/5 外推成 weekday edge。

### Recent Signal Attribution

周二两次都是 00:41–00:51 ET 的非 RTH down breakout，方向收益分别为 +0.74、+0.54 bps。周三五次里只有 08:45 ET 的 down breakout 为正；其余四次为负，最差是 16:02 ET 的 put-wall fade（-15.23 bps）。周三均值为 -3.69 bps。这里评价的是 300 秒标的方向，不是期权成交盈亏。

## Production Trade-Ready Replay

固定截止回放只有 3 个 unique production decisions：1 个严格成交、2 个安全跳过。样本量不足以声称策略正收益；唯一成交的 +$800 也没有覆盖手续费、显式滑点、排队、部分成交、市场冲击或人工通知延迟。

### Jul 22 Bad Intent

7/22 05:22 ET 的 7490C intent 不属于 RTH，却通过了名为 RTH 的 intent policy。记录 bid/ask 为 18.20/18.40、limit 18.20、剩余目标 5.60 点、失效距离 7.40 点，reward/risk=0.76。严格回放没有成交；若手动按 ask 18.40 追入，5 分钟 bid 约 17.50（-$90/张），15 分钟 bid 约 15.10（-$330/张）。这证明需要修复交易边界，不证明某个星期应被永久禁用。

## Historical Statistics Integrity

坏 intent 当时看到的 `sample_count=63 / winrate=30.16% / avg=-1.96%` 把同一次经济触碰生成的不同 event rows 重复计数。按 `first_touch_at + contract_id + play` 全局去重后，同一 play/level_kind 只剩 41 个样本，胜率 43.90%，平均 300 秒收益 +0.28%。修复方向是正确计数，不是用修正后的 43.90% 解除门控：95% 区间仍很宽，且未计交易成本。

## Cohort Separation

`confirmed`、`prefill`、`gth_dip` 是 control/proxy，不得与 production `trade_ready` 相加。confirmed baseline 的 13 个裸单合计 +$310，但中位数 -$160，收益依赖少数大赢家；GTH proxy 3 个裸单 0 胜、合计 -$440。forward exact GTH entry 与 exact spread complete exit 仍为 0/20，因此 GTH 保持 shadow。

## Scope, Data and Definitions

研究截止为 2026-07-22，exclusive cutoff 是 2026-07-23T00:00:00Z；不使用 7/23 的未完成 session。回放覆盖 8 个 observed partitions，其中 7 个通过分钟覆盖健康门槛，但 forward contract-consistent session 为 0/20。信号层读取首次进入 `CONFIRMED` 的 lifecycle 与正式 300 秒 outcomes；交易层读取 persisted `trade_intents` 并严格使用记录的 provider、contract、limit 与 expires_at。

`directional_return_bps` 是标的 300 秒原始回报按信号方向加符号。`proxy PnL` 是一张合约的历史报价回放，不是 broker PnL。`semantic sample` 是同一个 first touch、contract 与 play 的一次经济机会。42,719 个 intent evaluation 主要是 5 秒 telemetry，不是独立信号。所有金额显示到小数点后两位。

## Methodology and Model Validation

1. 冻结 7/22 cutoff，对 1,515 条 lifecycle transitions、84 条 formal outcomes、365 条 pricing outcomes、42,719 条 intent evaluations 与 6 条 GTH signals 做 grain reconciliation。
2. RTH 一律用 America/New_York 09:30–16:00 的 event timestamp 分类，不使用会混入盘后记录的 `session_bucket=rth_close`。
3. 复跑全部 persisted production trade-ready 与 control/proxy cohorts；严格使用 received-at knowledge cutoff、stored provider、contract、limit 与 expires_at。
4. 对 245 组 follow-through 参数做 exact-NBBO 重评分，同时报告 in-sample、leave-one-session-out、去最佳交易与 expanding walk-forward；只有后者可支持晋级。
5. 对最近 3 个 structure-invalidated break-pending events 只做明确标注的 underlier counterfactual，不把它们计入 exact option PnL。
6. 检查 weekday、play、direction、exit、spread、RR、target room、entry window 与追价敏感性；拒绝在小样本上挑星期或把网格冠军上线。
7. level_decision_health schema v2 从 7/23 起保存 spot/ES、levels、坐标、稳定/候选结构、machine settings、source snapshot 与 engine health，供未来 audit-equivalent walk-forward 使用。

## Limitations and Robustness

最重要的缺口是 broker ledger：缺少 7/20–7/22 的真实成交、数量、手续费与是否追价，因此无法把约 $12,000 拆成系统信号、执行偏差、仓位大小与 discretionary trades。回测假设 top-of-book 全量成交，未建模 commissions、显式 slippage、queue position、partial fills、market impact 或 operator latency，结果偏乐观。

信号历史只有 7 个健康 backtest sessions、3 个 unique production decisions、1 个严格成交；245-way grid 有明显选择偏差，且没有独立 holdout。7/22 前 health 缺少逐帧 live-level/candidate payload，所以不能对全历史做 audit-equivalent FSM sweep；结构反事实只可用于诊断，不能冒充交易回测。收益参数、星期参数、play filters、exit 与 GTH 晋级均未据此优化。

## Parameter Sensitivity

当前 follow-through 对 96 个 RTH semantic candidates 为 5 pass、88 fail、3 unavailable，exact RTH n=5、+$60.00，但只覆盖两个会话且去最佳后为 -$80.00。245 组中样本内最优的 `20s / max(0.5pt, 7.5% EM)` 为 RTH n=14、+$815.00；然而前三日训练为 +$1,175.00，后续唯一触发日 7/22 两笔为 -$360.00。没有一个诚实重评分参数能让最近周一、周二、周三同时既有信号又盈利，因此不为“看起来有信号”强行放宽。

## Parameter and Product Decisions

RR 1.00 回退到 0.25，因为 1.00 会删除全部历史可量化 RTH TradeReady，RR>=1.00 的两个方向样本反而均为负。0.25 不是 edge claim；它仍与 RTH-only、至少 3 点 target room、ES 同向、实时双边报价、限价和 20 秒窗口联合使用。结构 pending 生命周期修复解决近期 RTH 信号被错误吞掉的问题；follow-through、entry window、exit、spread、weekday 与 GTH 参数不放宽。

## Next Steps

1. P0：导入覆盖 2026-07-20–2026-07-22 的最新 IBKR Activity/Flex CSV，逐笔连接 intent、成交时间、数量、费用与实际退出，完成约 $12,000 loss attribution。
2. P0：保持自动下单关闭；RTH intent 只在 RTH 生成，GTH 继续走 exact-spread shadow contract。
3. P0：验证 structure-pending 修复的 forward lifecycle、formal confirmation、TradeReady blocker 与通知去重；不能用反事实 PnL替代真实观察。
4. P0：从 7/23 起连续收集 schema v2 health frames；达到至少 20 个 contract-consistent sessions、20 个 exact GTH entries、20 个 Put entries 与 20 个 exact exits 后再做冻结 cutoff 人工复审。
5. P1：预先登记 `20s/max(0.5pt,7.5% EM)` 等 shadow candidates 与主指标，采用 rolling walk-forward；成本情景至少包含 commission、半点/一档滑点、延迟与 partial-fill sensitivity。
6. P1：报告继续同时展示 raw record count 与 semantic opportunity count，防止服务重算次数冒充样本量。

## Further Questions

- 真实亏损中有多少来自系统提示后追价、加仓或未按 time stop 退出？
- 7/20–7/22 每笔订单的 contract、quantity、commission 与 realized PnL 是什么？
- structure-pending 修复后，未来 20 个 RTH sessions 的 lifecycle→confirmed→TradeReady 转化率是多少？
- RR 0.25 与预登记 shadow RR floors 在 forward 数据中的机会数、fill rate 与净成本后表现如何？
- GTH exact spread 的 short leg 流动性和报价年龄能否在每次 shadow decision 中完整保留？

accessIssues.message: 缺少覆盖 2026-07-20 至 2026-07-22 的 broker Activity/Flex 成交与费用数据；约 $12,000 的真实亏损暂不能逐笔归因。

parameter_sensitivity.validation: does not restore recent robust signals

weekday_summary.decision: 修执行边界；不做 weekday overfit

play_stats_compare.interpretation: 21 个重复经济机会污染样本量
计数已纠正；区间仍宽，不能解除门控

baseline_cohorts.warning: 少数赢家主导；不得并入生产总计

parameter_decisions.before: rth_trade_intent 可在非 RTH 放行
parameter_decisions.after: 非 RTH 固定 blocker: rth_session_required
parameter_decisions.evidence: 7/22 05:22 ET bad intent 泄漏；这是契约错误

parameter_decisions.before: candidate pending 立即使 active lifecycle invalidated
parameter_decisions.after: pending 仅阻止新 arm；active 使用 frozen stable level
parameter_decisions.evidence: 最近 10 个 RTH lifecycle 中 9 个被 pending 杀死
1.00 历史 RTH TradeReady=0；RR>=1 两样本均方向错误

parameter_decisions.before: event key 重算可重复计数
parameter_decisions.after: first_touch_at + contract_id + play 全局去重
parameter_decisions.evidence: Jul 22 同一统计从 n=63 修正为 n=41

parameter_decisions.before: bias 在第一行，容易被读成入场方向
parameter_decisions.after: 被门控时第一行固定 NO TRADE
parameter_decisions.evidence: 近期报告没有 explicit entry，却可能强化方向错觉

parameter_decisions.before: health v1 无法重建逐帧模型输入
parameter_decisions.after: schema v2 保存状态、参数、source snapshot 与 engine health
parameter_decisions.evidence: 支持未来 walk-forward；7/14–7/22 不可回补

parameter_decisions.after: 生产保持；grid top 仅 shadow
